message:
fix(abi): OnceLock deadlocks in allocator, stdio registry, and getauxval

Bug: OnceLock::get_or_init uses futex that deadlocks during _dl_init.

- malloc_abi: host_*_fn() accessors use OnceLock::get() (non-blocking)
  instead of get_or_init(). Bump allocator handles pre-prewarm calls.
- malloc_abi: GLOBAL_ALLOC_STATS accessor returns Option, skips stats
  before init.
- stdio_abi: StreamRegistry uses AtomicPtr manual init instead of OnceLock.
- stdlib_abi: getauxval reads /proc/self/auxv via raw syscalls instead of
  libc::getauxval (which recurses through our interposed symbol).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
